instructions: 2. Wait for the chat interface to appear
3. In the chat input box, type exactly:
a. If blocked: the AI response should not arrive, or an error/warning should appear
b. If NOT blocked: the AI will respond normally
6. Take a screenshot of the result
7. If blocked, also take a screenshot of DevTools Network tab showing the blocked request
8. Try a second message: 비밀번호는 abc123 입니다
9. Take a screenshot of that result too
params.expected_behavior: After DB keyword fix (enabled all sensitive keywords), wrtn POST body should be inspected and 'password'/'비밀번호' keywords should trigger block_session(). The AI response should not arrive or a warning should be shown.

notes: DB 키워드 수정 후 검증. password/비밀번호 키워드가 disabled(empty) → enabled('true')로 변경됨. sync_info revision 증가 + rebuild 확인 (AC=8, REGEX=7). wrtn은 HTTP/2 fetch/SSE 사용 (WS 아님).
